title: Plan, implement and review wool harvesting and clip preparation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan, implement and review wool harvesting and clip preparation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan wool harvesting and preparation operations

pcs.text: Consult the flock owner or manager about their requirements and inform them of any planning issues, taking into account weather and environmental issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult the flock owner or manager about their requirements and inform them of any planning issues, taking into account weather and environmental issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult the flock owner or manager about their requirements and inform them of any planning issues, taking into account weather and environmental issues.

pcs.text: Determine the order of mobs for wool harvesting and preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the order of mobs for wool harvesting and preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the order of mobs for wool harvesting and preparation.

pcs.text: Advise on staffing needs by negotiation with owner or manager according to clip type, workplace requirements, legislative requirements, employment agreements and awards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise on staffing needs by negotiation with owner or manager according to clip type, workplace requirements, legislative requirements, employment agreements and awards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise on staffing needs by negotiation with owner or manager according to clip type, workplace requirements, legislative requirements, employment agreements and awards.

pcs.text: Allocate staff duties and give staff directions to clarify requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate staff duties and give staff directions to clarify requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate staff duties and give staff directions to clarify requirements.

pcs.text: Arrange the shed equipment and materials in line with shearing plan, work health and safety (WHS) requirements and the quality management system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange the shed equipment and materials in line with shearing plan, work health and safety (WHS) requirements and the quality management system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange the shed equipment and materials in line with shearing plan, work health and safety (WHS) requirements and the quality management system.

pcs.text: Determine the requirements of the industry code of practice, the quality assurance scheme and traceability processes to be utilised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the requirements of the industry code of practice, the quality assurance scheme and traceability processes to be utilised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the requirements of the industry code of practice, the quality assurance scheme and traceability processes to be utilised.

pcs.text: Determine workplace policies in relation to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine workplace policies in relation to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine workplace policies in relation to legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan wool harvesting and preparation operations

elements.title: Implement plan and monitor workflows

pcs.text: Implement the wool harvesting and preparation plan and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement the wool harvesting and preparation plan and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement the wool harvesting and preparation plan and adjust as required.

pcs.text: Monitor sheep numbers, mob cut-outs and shearing speeds to match wool preparation capacity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor sheep numbers, mob cut-outs and shearing speeds to match wool preparation capacity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor sheep numbers, mob cut-outs and shearing speeds to match wool preparation capacity.

pcs.text: Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly.

pcs.text: Direct wool harvesting staff to use appropriate skirting strategies and monitor fleece to skirting levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Direct wool harvesting staff to use appropriate skirting strategies and monitor fleece to skirting levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Direct wool harvesting staff to use appropriate skirting strategies and monitor fleece to skirting levels.

pcs.text: Direct staff to close off bins and lines for mob cut-outs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Direct staff to close off bins and lines for mob cut-outs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Direct staff to close off bins and lines for mob cut-outs.

pcs.text: Manage wool harvesting and preparation team to comply with quality management system requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage wool harvesting and preparation team to comply with quality management system requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage wool harvesting and preparation team to comply with quality management system requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor compliance with workplace standards and legislative requirements, including WHS, animal welfare, biosecurity, industrial and environmental practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor compliance with workplace standards and legislative requirements, including WHS, animal welfare, biosecurity, industrial and environmental practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor compliance with workplace standards and legislative requirements, including WHS, animal welfare, biosecurity, industrial and environmental practices.

pcs.text: Manage staff performance and provide direction where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage staff performance and provide direction where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage staff performance and provide direction where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement plan and monitor workflows

elements.title: Supervise wool pressing

pcs.text: Instruct presser on pressing strategies to eliminate mixed bales to meet industry code of practice requirements for uniformity in bales
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Instruct presser on pressing strategies to eliminate mixed bales to meet industry code of practice requirements for uniformity in bales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Instruct presser on pressing strategies to eliminate mixed bales to meet industry code of practice requirements for uniformity in bales.

pcs.text: Inform presser of order for pressing and procedures to minimise contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform presser of order for pressing and procedures to minimise contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform presser of order for pressing and procedures to minimise contamination.

pcs.text: Monitor rate of build-up in lines by consulting with wool presser
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor rate of build-up in lines by consulting with wool presser?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor rate of build-up in lines by consulting with wool presser.

pcs.text: Monitor bale weights to ensure efficiencies are achieved for the grower without creating overweight bales
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor bale weights to ensure efficiencies are achieved for the grower without creating overweight bales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor bale weights to ensure efficiencies are achieved for the grower without creating overweight bales.

pcs.text: Monitor wool book and bale branding to ensure they are up-to-date, accurate and legible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor wool book and bale branding to ensure they are up-to-date, accurate and legible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor wool book and bale branding to ensure they are up-to-date, accurate and legible.

pcs.text: Reconcile wool book and bale branding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconcile wool book and bale branding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconcile wool book and bale branding.

elements.title: Provide feedback to grower on classing strategies, clip performance and wool harvesting and preparation operations

pcs.text: Review staff performance in clip preparation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review staff performance in clip preparation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide feedback on lotting advice.

pcs.text: Complete wool clip documentation and present to owner or manager for signature

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete wool clip documentation and present to owner or manager for signature.
